resources.string: The Vault is locked. Return to CipherBoard and unlock it to view this contact.
This contact is unavailable. It may have been deleted, or the protected navigation session expired.
The protected contact record could not be updated. No unsafe partial change was accepted.
Only this public fingerprint will be sent to the app you choose. The local contact name, Safety Number, identifiers, and session state are not included. This does not verify or pair a contact.
No app accepted the public fingerprint.
Critical warning: this identity key differs from the key previously stored for this contact. Secure messages remain blocked until you compare the new Safety Number in person and explicitly trust it.
Compare both representations with the other person in the same physical location. Do not verify from a screenshot or a message sent through an untrusted transport.
Confirm only after both devices show exactly the same Safety Number and word code.
Safety Number comparison confirmed; the contact remains verified.
This destroys the current session and its pending message state, marks the contact as requiring pairing, and starts a new in-person two-QR exchange. It cannot be undone.
The ratchet, replay markers, and pending messages for this contact will be deleted. The contact remains visible but cannot exchange messages until paired again.
The local contact record, session, replay markers, and pending messages will be deleted. CipherBoard cannot recover them.
